query: SELECT id, name, slug FROM atolls WHERE name LIKE '%gnavi%'; SELECT p.id, p.name, p.slug, p.type FROM places p WHERE p.atollId = (SELECT id FROM atolls WHERE name LIKE '%gnavi%') AND p.type = 'island';
